_README: Human-owned verdict overrides for the disk-audit ledger. The audit writer READS this file and NEVER edits it. Keys are normalized project roots with forward slashes (e.g. 'D:/Research/Uncertainty') OR a bare project name. Each value is {"verdict": "keep" | "quarantine", "reason": "..."}. You can force keep or quarantine; you can NEVER make the writer emit a delete. Deletion is always a separate, explicit human action outside this system.
